action_set_definitions.name: fetch_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the energy environment, including grid demand, battery status, and renewable output.

action_set_definitions.name: set_battery_power
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the power output of the battery storage system for the current interval.

power_mw.description: The power to dispatch. Positive values discharge the battery (reduce grid demand); negative values charge it.

action_set_definitions.name: set_load_reduction
action_set_definitions.description: Reduces the industrial process load to lower the net grid demand.

reduction_mw.description: The amount of load to shed in Megawatts.

action_set_definitions.name: step_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment simulation to the next time interval and applies the dispatched actions.

state_description.timestamp: The current simulation time in ISO 8601 format.
state_description.battery_soc_mwh: Current State of Charge of the energy storage system in Megawatt-hours.
state_description.grid_demand_mw: Current power demand from the local grid in Megawatts.
state_description.renewable_output_mw: Combined real-time power generation from solar and wind sources.
state_description.market_price_per_mwh: Current clearing price of electricity in the wholesale market ($).
state_description.cumulative_cost: Total operational cost or profit accumulated since the start of the episode.
